requirement_topic.en: Filtration claims and test evidence for FFP-level respirators
requirement_topic.zh: FFP等级口罩的过滤能力与测试证据
requirement_topic.zht: FFP等級口罩的過濾能力與測試證據

summary.en: UAE-facing respirator products that claim filtration performance should have test evidence aligned to the UAE-adopted EN 149 structure and corresponding documentation trail in ECAS dossier. The target route focuses on performance class, ingress resistance, and use limitations stated in the approved standard text.
summary.zh: 阿联酋进口口罩若标称过滤防护性能，应配备与UAE采用的EN 149框架一致的测试证据，并在ECAS技术文件中形成完整链条。关注重点为过滤等级、吸入阻力相关要求和标准规定的使用限制。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋進口口罩若標稱過濾防護能力，應配備與阿聯酋採用之EN 149框架一致的測試證據，並在ECAS技術文件中形成完整鏈條。關注重點為過濾等級、吸入阻力相關要求及標準規定的使用限制。

standards_or_laws: GSO EN 149:2001+A1:2020 — Respiratory protective devices, filtering half masks
MoIAT PPE service framework requiring supported technical assessment

summary.en: In China the principal technical baseline is GB 2626-2019 with KN classes and non-oily particulate filtration criteria. Class naming differs from UAE claims, so direct copy of KN labels to FFP claims is not accepted without bridging explanation.
summary.zh: 中国端的核心技术依据是GB 2626-2019，采用KN系列与非油性颗粒滤效标准。该等级命名与阿联酋的FFP类属不同，因此KN标签不能直接当作FFP宣称，需提供对照说明。
summary.zht: 中國端的核心技術依據是GB 2626-2019，採用KN系列與非油性顆粒過濾標準。該等級命名與阿聯酋FFP類屬不同，因此KN標籤不能直接作為FFP宣稱，需提供對照說明。

gap.en: A common gap is marketing KN90/KN95 language as if it were identical to FFP2 in all contexts. UAE importers usually need explicit equivalence tables, test methods, and use-case constraints for each shipment file.
gap.zh: 常见缺口是将KN90/KN95语言当作与FFP2完全等同。阿联酋通常需要每批次文件中提供明确的等效对照、测试方法和使用场景说明。
gap.zht: 常見缺口是將KN90/KN95語言視作與FFP2完全等同。阿聯酋通常需要每批次文件中提供明確的等效對照、測試方法和使用場景說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for claimed protective performance in market-facing documents
mandatory_status.cn: Required for domestic market claims and repeatable technical claims in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Claim strength in UAE is increased only when EN 149-compatible evidence is packaged with the UAE application, not by CN title alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿联酋，FFP类宣称的有效性依赖于与ECAS配套的EN 149型试验及完整技术证据，而不仅是中文标准名。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在阿聯酋，FFP類聲稱的有效性取決於與ECAS配套的EN 149型試驗與完整技術證據，而不僅是中文標準名稱。

requirement_topic.en: Product warnings, operational instructions, and safe-use conditions
requirement_topic.zh: 产品警示、操作说明与安全使用条件
requirement_topic.zht: 產品警示、操作說明與安全使用條件

summary.en: For items presenting user risk, UAE product information rules require clear warnings and user instructions on use, storage, and risk limits in languages matching UAE consumer law expectations, with distributor information visible in the channel and no unsupported safety claims.
summary.zh: 对于存在安全风险的产品，阿联酋对产品信息要求明确风险警示、使用方法、储存条件及使用限制，并结合合规渠道使用本地可读语言展示，禁止没有证据的安全功效宣称。
summary.zht: 對於存在安全風險的產品，阿聯酋對產品信息要求明確風險警示、使用方法、儲存條件及使用限制，並結合合規渠道使用本地可讀語言展示，禁止無證據安全功效宣稱。

standards_or_laws: Federal Law No. (15) of 2020 and related executive requirements on product labelling and risk warnings (Arabic requirement for consumer data)
UAE in-country supplier obligations under the consumer protection and product information regime

summary.en: GB 2626 and GB 19083 standards require marking and instructions, but exporters should not assume those wordings satisfy UAE legal text requirements. CN warnings often target domestic language and market conventions, so additional adaptation is usually required.
summary.zh: GB 2626和GB 19083都要求标示和说明，但不能简单视为满足阿联酋法律用语。中国出厂文本通常按中国市场语言与习惯编制，通常仍需再次适配。
summary.zht: GB 2626和GB 19083都要求標示和說明，但不能簡單視為滿足阿聯酋法律用語。中國出廠文本通常按中國市場語言與習慣編制，通常仍需再次適配。

standards_or_laws: GB 2626-2019 — Marking and user information requirements in standard text
GB 19083-2010 — Markings and instructions for protective face masks

gap.en: Exporters often ship products with Chinese-only instructions and no Arabic consumer-facing warning block. This is commonly corrected during UAE import compliance review, including reprint or relabel decisions and distributor-side corrections.
gap.zh: 出口商常见问题是仅附中文说明且无阿拉伯语风险提示区块，阿联酋合规审查常要求补充文案或改签，且可能触发二次贴签。
gap.zht: 出口商常見問題是僅附中文說明且無阿拉伯語風險提示區塊，阿聯酋合規審查常要求補充文案或改簽，並可能觸發二次貼簽。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for user safety and consumer-law compliant market access
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under Chinese consumer-safety documentation practice for relevant masks

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Keep warning, storage, and use-condition statements explicit and verifiable; generic English-only text is usually insufficient for full UAE retail and regulatory clarity.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 需保持警示、储存和使用条件说明清晰可验证，单一英文文本通常不足以覆盖阿联酋的消费者和监管清晰性要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 需保持警示、儲存和使用條件說明清晰可驗證，單一英文文本通常不足以覆蓋阿聯酋的消費者及監管清晰性要求。
